description: Enable DKIM signing for your mail by publishing the selector CNAME your provider requires. The record delegates the selector under _domainkey to the provider's hosted DKIM key so outbound mail can be cryptographically signed.
variableDescription: %dkimSelector%: DKIM selector label your mail provider assigned (placed before ._domainkey). %dkimTarget%: Hostname your mail provider hosts the DKIM public key at (the CNAME target).
